extension.description: A tag-based Markdown journaling tool for easy daily note-taking.
config.title: VS Journal
config.autoSaveMarkdown: If auto-save is enabled, the file will be saved after the specified time (ms). Set to 0 to disable.
config.journalDir.markdownDescription: Directory where journal files are stored. [Click here to select a folder](command:vs-journal.selectJournalDir)
config.enableDateTime.description: Insert date and time into new files.
config.enableDateTime.markdownDescriptio: Automatically insert the current date and time below the heading when creating a new journal entry.
config.systemTags.today.description: Enable or disable the Today system tag in the tag tree.
config.systemTags.today.markdownDescript:
Use this setting to control the visibility of the Today system tag in the tag tree.

Set to true to display Today, false to hide it.
config.confirmDeleteFile.description: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting a file from the tag tree.
config.confirmDeleteFile.markdownDescrip: If enabled, a confirmation dialog will appear before deleting a file from the tag tree. Disable this to delete files without confirmation.
command.deleteFile.title: Delete File
